description: An agent must clean a raw client dataset (CSV) by handling missing values and removing duplicates before analysis.

nodes.task_description: Load the raw CSV data and generate a data quality report, identifying columns with missing values and the number of duplicate rows.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a report stating there are 50 duplicate rows and missing values in the 'Region' column.

nodes.task_description: Remove all duplicate rows from the dataset.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly removes the duplicate entries.

nodes.task_description: For the column with missing values, fill them with the mode (most frequent value).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly imputes the missing data.
